TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_zyugi’, title = zyugi’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/zyugi’} }

S.FORM: zyugi' mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. mnhhway qmara' sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'.

zyugi' mzyugi' sun na Tayal hya' ga, aring sa ini' uwah na' qu Gipun hga, nanak yaquw mnwah mgaga' squ ryax na magal ina' ga nanu' si kiy min'aring mtalah lga yasa qu mutuw mzyugi'. mnhhway qmara' sun maha zyugi' na Tayal balay hya' ga, nanu' qu sun maha mnhhway qmara' ka yasa siy s'rux ini' 'nrawmul iyal, ruw mnhawhway mkura' tay 'zil, ini' ga tay 'llaw mshzi'.
S.PHON: zjuɣiʔ mzjuɣiʔ s~ɕun na tajal ħjaʔ ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕa iniʔ uwaħ naʔ qu ɣipun ħɣa, nanak jaquw mnwaħ mɣaɣaʔ s~ɕqu rjax na maɣal inaʔ ɣa nanuʔ s~ɕi kij minʔariŋ mtalaħ lɣa jas~ɕa qu mutuw mzjuɣiʔ. mnħħwaj qmaraʔ s~ɕun maħa zjuɣiʔ na tajal βalaj ħjaʔ ɣa, nanuʔ qu s~ɕun maħa mnħħwaj qmaraʔ ka jas~ɕa s~ɕij s~ɕʔrux iniʔ ʔnrawmul ijal, ruw mnħawħwaj mkuraʔ taj ʔzil, iniʔ ɣa taj ʔllaw ms~ɕħziʔ.
